review_text: Uiterst vriendelijke ontvangst. Mooi, schoon park met uitstekende faciliteiten.

We stayed here 2 nights over Easter. We found the caravan powered sites spacious and pleasent. We travelled with two kids and a small dog and on site there are swings and the showground next to the park has off leash area for dogs. A drive to town still but a clean decent stopover. We had a gorgeous sunrise too. Receptionist who checked us in Saturday was very Lovely and helpful.

Lovely park with easy access to most things. The only thing that freaked me out was the large gap between floor and toilet/shower stall door. Large enough for an adult to crawl under. Apart from that facilities were kept clean and tidy and staff were very friendly.

Very friendly welcoming sign in, large roomy powered sites.
Amenities were clean and functional, we had a nice quiet and relaxed stay.
This is a very nice caravan park. The staff a very nice. It’s a good place for over night. We just used a powered site. It has everything you need, but not want

Loved my stay with Colour City Caravan Park. So friendly and welcoming.
Great clean cabin with a well equipped clean kitchen.
Peaceful and very tidy grounds.
I would highly recommend this caravan park.

Camped here in my roof top tent. Toilets and amenities were clean. Very quiet mid-week. There’s a train line is across the road, which had some extremely noisy diesel freight trains pass by during the night.
Quiet, peaceful, friendly. Very good camp kitchen. The bathrooms are very clean; good showers.
Visited friends. Very pleasant,  clean and tidy.

A nice apparently council operated caravan park. We arrived in two RVs and after some hesitation were able to get two adjacent powered van sites relatively close to the amenities block. Nothing fancy about this park but it’s secure after hours, was really clean and easy to get in and out of.
Ladies shower very small mens are great clean and tidy lovely park
Lovely receptionist very clean amenities
Nice clean park. Amenities spotless with good showers. Plenty of space for caravan. Highly recommend when staying in Orange.
Great caravan park. Lovely ladies in at the office very helpful. Dogs allowed in your van, but no cabins. Reasonable prices. $41 a night. Lovely outdoor kitchen and fireplace.

I highly recommend this fantastic caravan park! With its spacious sites, grounds and a large, well-maintained toilet block, it offers everything you need for a comfortable stay. The location is simply beautiful, surrounded by showgrounds, and the staff are incredibly friendly and welcoming. It’s a perfect getaway for anyone looking to relax and enjoy the great outdoors!

Exceptional experience with camping under a powered site at this place over the Easter weekend. Friendly staff, clean and plenty of toilets, showers . Camp kitchen is all in right place with all ameneties.

Great, quiet caravan park. Concrete pad and green grass. Amenities extremely clean. Aldi over the road. Walking to pubs, restaurants, shops and brewery. An abundance of wineries short drive away. Loved our 2 night stay here.
Nice place to stay
Always accommodating always friendly
Yearly stay for a few days during Orange Field Days
Very nice place, quiet clean and some nice wildlife. Very friendly staff.

Nice comfortable cabin, but we had a cabin that backed on to Leeds parade and a railway line. So it was a bit noisy during the night with traffic. Toilet and shower was in a room not big enough for the both of them , could hardly move!!
Stayed here a few times now. Great spot, cabins clean and staff are great. 👍
Nice quiet park nice clean amenities.

Great location at Orange. Nice quiet park, staff at reception were amazing well mannered and polite with plenty of local information about the area.
Only negative comment would be that the ammenaties need an upgrade but overall it was a pleasant experience.
We would return to Colour City Caravan Park next time we're in Orange.
Kye and Shaz are so helpful and friendly. Kye has gone above  and beyond assisting us during our stay.

I camped there with my swag in the middle of winter. The park itself did not have many bookings (probably due to the cold). Very clean bathrooms, showers, kitchens. It does get loud in the morning due to a nearby kennel and train station but the noise comes and goes it's not like Central station. Staff are very friendly and helpful.
It was central and close to where our friends live, so was perfect for us.

Quiet on night we stayed, clean facilities, friendly office ladies.
Site gutters a little annoying but hey they were mountable.

A weekend stay in our van so no rooms or service, although people we travelled with were very happy with the cabins thet had. Would definitely stay agian if in Orange.
Only suggestion is perhaps a few electric bbq's in the caravan area, especially given there were a lot of tent campers who basically tied up the camp kitchen.
Staff are very friendly. Standard cabin is cosy and clean

Spent a few nights there over christmas..park itself was generally clean but in the evening it tends to get unruly and music going all night...i think being a COUNCIL run park the office is unattended after hours..lots of backpackers there who dont care about others or common decency ..dont think i would rush back there..nice shower block but sadly not all showers worked i found 2 out of 5 actually had water...toilets not so clean either.
Trop belles rencontres, camping pas cher avec tout le besoin nécessaire a disposition, les communs sont propres
A lovely well kept park.

Stayed in a deluxe cabin for work for four nights, still recovering from the lack of sleep. May as well be on the road, bedroom 1.5 metres from busy road. Train comes through twice a night and beeps horn. Horrendous experience wont be going back. Owners need to move the deluxe cabins to a better location.
Great well maintained park

We arrived with  car troubles  the staff very obliging. Sort out a site for us n arranged around us If we need to stay longer. It was coming into long weekend   Very helpful which we appreciated  the park is immaculate. Credit to all would thoughly  recommend.  Thank you sincerely

We had a powered caravan site with easy access. The amenities were very clean, the laundry was spacious and the machines reasonably priced. The staff were very pleasant and helpful. I would stay there again.
Old Park, well maintained in good location for shopping.
Awesome. Great place for a weekend retreat
Stayed in 3 bedroom cottage with friends. Nice and clean, plenty of room but a little noisy at night due to the freight trains that pass by a few times and rattle the whole place for a few minutes.

The staff at check in were friendly enough. The cabin was comfortable and heater worked well.  The bathroom was not clean. Upon arrival, there was mould & hairs in the shower, on the shower doors & door tracks. Under & around the vanity & toilet was a film of grime, dirt, hairs etc. Clearly the bathroom had not been properly cleaned in quite a while - see attached photos. Disappointing when you're paying $120 / night for unsanitary conditions.
